mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, course_id, course_name, amount, payment_method, status, refund_amount, paid_at, refunded_at, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_course_order (order_no, user_id, course_id, course_name, amount, payment_method, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{amount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_course_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_course_order WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_course_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM edu_course_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_course_order SET status = 2, refund_amount = #{refundAmount}, refunded_at = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0
